info.title: Poka platform integrations/API Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Poka publicly describes flexible integration tooling through REST APIs, Automate iPaaS workflows, Data Lake exports, and SCIM provisioning for connected-worker and digital manufacturing data exchange.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Poka platform integrations/API. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Poka's public integrations page describes four public integration approaches: Poka Automate for iPaaS workflow automation, Poka API for RESTful third-party integrations, Poka Data Lake for analytics export, and Poka SCIM for user and user-group provisioning. The public use cases and customer stories show integrations for SAP-driven maintenance resolution, Tableau-backed safety reporting with forms, and Workday-connected personnel training data, while the site repeatedly positions Poka as a system for connecting people, data, processes, tasks, and systems in digital manufacturing. This is a write-capable connected-worker integration surface with supported asset-oriented workflows, but not a telemetry platform. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.
